items.summary: Redesign the LoginPrompt component (frontend/src/components/LoginPrompt.tsx) with a clean, modern aesthetic. The login page should feature a bold hero area with the Kollect Lite logo/wordmark, a concise tagline, and a prominently styled 'Login with Internet Identity' button. Use the app's existing teal brand color as the primary accent, layered on a deep charcoal or off-white background with generous whitespace and refined typography.

Create a new landing page component (frontend/src/pages/LandingPage.tsx) for Kollect Lite that is shown to unauthenticated visitors before they log in. The landing page must include: (1) a hero section with the app logo, headline, and a call-to-action 'Get Started' button that triggers Internet Identity login; (2) a features section highlighting 3–4 core capabilities of the app (e.g., Case Management, Activity Tracking, Document Handling, Role-Based Access) with icon cards; (3) a minimal footer with copyright. Apply the same clean teal + charcoal visual theme as the login page.
Update the router in frontend/src/App.tsx to display the new LandingPage for unauthenticated users as the root route, ensuring that logging in transitions the user to the Task Queue as before.

Apply a cohesive visual theme across the login and landing pages: use a deep charcoal (#1A1F2E or similar dark tone) as the background, the existing brand teal (oklch-based CSS variable) as the primary accent color, clean sans-serif typography with clear hierarchy (large hero titles, medium subheadings, small body), subtle card shadows, and smooth hover transitions on interactive elements.
